items.title_en: DeepSeek v4
items.title_zh: DeepSeek v4
items.summary_en: DeepSeek v4 continues to push long-context capabilities, delivering more memory-efficient retrieval and scalable context processing for large language models. The update targets practical deployments that need to reason over very long documents without blowing through resources.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek v4 在长上下文能力上进一步提升，提供更高效的检索和可扩展的上下文处理，便于大模型在海量文档上进行推理而不耗费过多资源。此版本面向实际部署场景，改善长期上下文的可用性。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 发布
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.5, the latest mid-cycle upgrade in the GPT-5 family. It emphasizes faster inference, safer defaults, and enhanced developer controls for production deployments, signaling another step in the rapid evolution of foundation models.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.5，作为 GPT-5 线的中期升级。新版本强调更快的推理与更安全的默认设置，并为开发者提供更丰富的部署控制，再次推动大型语言模型的迭代速度。

items.title_en: Ubuntu 26.04
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 发布
items.summary_en: Ubuntu 26.04 arrives as a long-term release with updated kernels and desktop components, plus enterprise-oriented improvements. It emphasizes stability, security, and hardware support, serving as a reliable base for both desktops and servers.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 26.04 作为长期版本发布，带来内核与桌面组件的更新以及面向企业的改进。强调稳定性、安全性，并提升对新硬件的支持，适合作为桌面与服务器的长期基线。

items.title_en: Palantir employees are starting to wonder if they're the bad guys
items.title_zh: Palantir 员工开始质疑自己是否在做坏事
items.summary_en: Palantir employees are starting to question whether their work contributes to harmful surveillance and wrongdoing. As Palantir expands government-facing analytics, staff wrestle with ethical concerns about surveillance, data ethics, and public accountability.
items.summary_zh: Palantir 员工在公司日益扩张的政府数据分析工作中，开始质疑这是否在助长监控与潜在的滥用。伦理、数据治理与公共问责成为内部讨论的焦点。

items.title_en: Habitual coffee intake shapes the microbiome, modifies physiology and cognition
items.title_zh: 日常咖啡摄入改变微生物群、影响生理与认知
items.summary_en: Habitual coffee intake reshapes the gut microbiome and alters physiological markers and cognitive function. The study links daily caffeine consumption to specific microbial shifts and metabolic changes, with potential implications for energy, mood, and brain health.
items.summary_zh: 规律性咖啡摄入会重塑肠道微生物群、改变生理指标并影响认知功能。研究将日常咖啡因摄入与特定微生物变化及代谢改变联系起来，可能对能量、情绪和大脑健康产生影响。

items.title_en: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.title_zh: Claude Code 质量更新
items.summary_en: Anthropic provides an update on Claude Code quality, sharing metrics, fixes, and ongoing efforts after recent reports. The update highlights remaining challenges in code-generation reliability and the team's approach to testing and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code 质量更新，披露关键指标、已完成的修复以及后续改进计划。报告强调代码生成的可靠性挑战仍在，并介绍团队加强测试和安全措施的措施。

items.title_en: Meta tells staff it will cut 10% of jobs
items.title_zh: Meta 将裁员 10%
items.summary_en: Meta told staff it will cut 10% of jobs, part of a broader efficiency push to rebalance costs as the company doubles down on AI initiatives. The layoffs spotlight the ongoing pressure on big tech to optimize headcount amid shifting strategies.
items.summary_zh: Meta 通知员工将裁减约 10% 的岗位，旨在提升运营效率并在加码 AI 项目之际重新平衡成本。裁员凸显大型科技公司在战略调整期对人力资源进行优化的普遍压力。

items.title_en: Why I Write (1946)
items.title_zh: 我为何写作（1946）
items.summary_en: Orwell explains that writers are driven by four motives—ego, aesthetic pleasure, historical impulse, and political purpose—and argues that writing should aim to illuminate truth and resist tyranny. The piece remains a candid meditation on why serious writing matters in a world of rising propaganda.
items.summary_zh: 奥威尔在文中提出写作源于四种动机：自我、审美、历史冲动和政治目的，并主张写作应以揭示真相、抵制暴政为目标。此篇对在极权与宣传日益高涨的时代，写作为何仍然重要给出直率的思考。

items.title_en: Bitwarden CLI compromised in ongoing Checkmarx supply chain campaign
items.title_zh: Bitwarden CLI 在持续的 Checkmarx 供应链攻击中被妥协
items.summary_en: Bitwarden CLI was compromised as part of a broader supply chain campaign tied to Checkmarx, illustrating how attackers weaponize developer toolchains. The incident underscores the risk of compromised updates and the need for strict verification of CLI binaries, signatures, and release channels.
items.summary_zh: Bitwarden CLI 据称在与 Checkmarx 相关的供应链活动中被篡改，暴露了开发工具链的脆弱性。此事件强调应对 CLI 更新进行签名验证、固定版本、并监控 CI/CD 流水线中的异常更新。

items.title_en: Composition Shouldn't be this Hard
items.title_zh: 组合不应如此困难
items.summary_en: An announcement about simplifying software composition with a new approach or tool that reduces boilerplate and makes assembling components easier. It argues current practices force brittle, ad-hoc architectures and offers a path toward more modular, scalable design.
items.summary_zh: 该帖公布了一种简化软件组成的方案，提出通过新工具或方法降低样板代码并提升组件拼接的易用性。作者批评现有做法容易让架构变得脆弱，提出更模块化、可扩展的设计方向。

items.title_en: Alberta startup sells no-tech tractors for half price
items.title_zh: 阿尔伯塔初创以半价销售无科技拖拉机
items.summary_en: An Alberta startup is selling traditional, no-tech tractors at half the price of modern models, targeting farmers who value simplicity and repairability. By removing electronics, they cut upfront costs and maintenance headaches, challenging mainstream ag-tech pricing and support models.
items.summary_zh: 一家阿尔伯塔初创企业以半价销售无科技的拖拉机，瞄准看重简单与易修的农民。去除电子系统后，制造与维护成本下降，这一做法可能影响主流农业科技的定价和售后模式。

items.title_en: If America's so rich, how'd it get so sad?
items.title_zh: 美国这么富有，怎会变得如此悲伤？
items.summary_en: Derek Thompson argues that America's wealth hasn't translated into happiness due to inequality, social fragmentation, and policy choices; the piece connects economic growth with wellbeing and the impact of technology like AI.
items.summary_zh: 德里克·汤普森认为美国的繁荣并未带来相应的幸福感，原因在于不平等、社会分化和政策选择。文章探讨经济增长、社会福祉之间的错配，以及技术（包括 AI）对这种关系的影响。

items.title_en: I am building a cloud
items.title_zh: 我在打造一个云
items.summary_en: A personal cloud infrastructure is explored from scratch, detailing architectures, tooling, and practical tradeoffs. It weighs self-hosted storage, compute, and networking against public cloud tradeoffs, offering actionable lessons for readers considering building their own cloud.
items.summary_zh: 本文记录从零开始打造个人云端基础设施的过程，探讨存储、计算与网络的权衡以及提高可靠性的设计要点。作者分享了在自建云与公有云之间的取舍，并给出可操作的经验教训。

items.title_en: US special forces soldier arrested after allegedly winning $400k on Maduro raid
items.title_zh: 美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获利被逮捕
items.summary_en: A US special forces soldier was arrested amid allegations of illicit gains linked to a Maduro raid, highlighting potential security and ethics concerns within covert operations. The case raises questions about governance, accountability, and the handling of sensitive operation proceeds.
items.summary_zh: 一名美军特种部队士兵因涉嫌在马杜罗突袭案中获得40万美元收益而被逮捕，暴露了隐秘行动中的治理与伦理问题。这起案件引发对透明度、问责制以及敏感行动收益处理的讨论。

items.title_en: French government agency confirms breach as hacker offers to sell data
items.title_zh: 法国政府机构遭遇数据泄露：黑客提出出售数据
items.summary_en: A French government agency confirms a data breach; a hacker is publicly offering to sell the stolen data. The incident highlights the risk to sensitive citizen data and the ongoing commodification of breached information.
items.summary_zh: 法国政府机构确认遭遇数据泄露，攻击者公开提出出售被盗数据。事件暴露了对公民敏感信息的风险，同时凸显被盗数据买卖的普遍性及持续威胁。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tolaria – Open-source macOS app to manage Markdown knowledge bases
items.title_zh: Tolaria：用于管理 Markdown 知识库的开源 macOS 应用
items.summary_en: Tolaria is an open-source macOS app for managing Markdown knowledge bases. It offers local-first storage, markdown editing, and linking between notes to create a searchable knowledge graph. For researchers and developers who want offline, portable knowledge management, it's a compelling option.
items.summary_zh: Tolaria 是一个开源的 macOS 应用，用来管理 Markdown 知识库。它支持本地存储、Markdown 编辑，以及笔记之间的连结，方便构建可搜索的知识体系。对需要离线、可移植笔记管理的开发者和研究者很有吸引力。

items.title_en: A quick look at Mythos run on Firefox: too much hype?
items.title_zh: Firefox 上 Mythos 的快速观察：炒作是否过头？
items.summary_en: A quick look at Mythos on Firefox casts doubt on the hype, highlighting gaps between promised capabilities and early real-world performance.
items.summary_zh: 对 Mythos 在 Firefox 上的快速评测显示，宣传与实际表现之间存在差距，质疑 hype 的说法。

items.title_en: Girl, 10, finds rare Mexican axolotl under Welsh bridge
items.title_zh: 10岁女孩在威尔士的一座桥下发现罕见的墨西哥钝口螈
items.summary_en: A 10-year-old girl in Wales found a rare Mexican axolotl under a bridge, a remarkable sighting outside its native range. The story spotlights conservation and citizen science dynamics when unusual species show up in unexpected places. It also underscores how outreach and curiosity connect people to wildlife.
items.summary_zh: 威尔士一名10岁女孩在一座桥下发现罕见的墨西哥钝口螈，这一发现颇为罕见且引人注目。此事凸显了在非原产地也会出现独特物种的保护与公民科学的互动，同时也体现了公众对野生动物的关注与好奇心。

items.title_en: Familiarity is the enemy: On why Enterprise systems have failed for 60 years
items.title_zh: 熟悉感是敌人：企业系统为何60年来屡次失败
items.summary_en: Longstanding familiarity with legacy architectures is blamed for persistent enterprise-system failures. The piece calls for abandoning dogmatic habits in favor of pragmatic observability, composable services, and fresh mental models to modernize.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张长期以来对现有架构的依赖和熟悉感是企业系统长期失败的根源。文章呼吁抛弃守旧思维，转向以可观测性、可组合服务和新思维模式为核心的现代化路径。

items.title_en: Incident with multple GitHub services
items.title_zh: GitHub 多项服务故障事件
items.summary_en: GitHub reports an incident affecting multiple services, impacting developers' workflows. The incident underscores the fragility of cloud‑hosted DevOps tools and the importance of robust incident response and contingency planning.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 因多项服务出现故障，影响开发者工作流。这起事件凸显云端开发工具的脆弱性以及健全的应急响应和备份计划的重要性。

items.title_en: Using the internet like it's 1999
items.title_zh: 像在1999年一样上网
items.summary_en: A look at surfacing the web with retro, dial-up aesthetics and minimal modern features, challenging today’s feature-heavy UX.
items.summary_zh: 以1999年的互联网方式上网，回归简约、低带宽体验，挑战当下功能繁多的用户体验。文章讨论简化界面、离线优先与低广告干扰的体验对性能、隐私与可访问性的影响。

items.title_en: Apple fixes bug that cops used to extract deleted chat messages from iPhones
items.title_zh: 苹果修复漏洞，警方曾用其提取已删除的 iPhone 聊天记录
items.summary_en: Apple fixed a bug that allowed law enforcement to recover deleted iPhone chat messages, a rare privacy breach that persisted across devices. The patch closes this forensic loophole, reinforcing user data deletion and security. It underscores the ongoing tug-of-war between privacy protections and investigative tools in mobile platforms.
items.summary_zh: 苹果修复了一个以前被执法部门用来提取已删除 iPhone 聊天记录的漏洞。上述修补加强了消息删除的彻底性，提升了用户隐私的保护。此事再次凸显移动平台在隐私保护与执法需求之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: MeshCore development team splits over trademark dispute and AI-generated code
items.title_zh: MeshCore 开发团队因商标纠纷与 AI 生成代码分裂
items.summary_en: MeshCore's dev team splits amid a trademark dispute and debates over AI-generated code, highlighting tensions between IP ownership and the governance of machine-generated outputs. This quarrel signals how legal questions around branding and code provenance can reshape internal teams and project direction.
items.summary_zh: MeshCore 的开发团队因商标争议与对 AI 生成代码的治理分歧而分裂，反映出知识产权归属与机器生成内容管理之间的紧张关系。此事或将影响团队组织与项目走向，揭示企业需要尽早就品牌与代码来源达成共识。

items.title_en: TorchTPU: Running PyTorch Natively on TPUs at Google Scale
items.title_zh: TorchTPU：在 Google 规模的 TPUs 上原生运行 PyTorch
items.summary_en: TorchTPU enables PyTorch to run natively on Google-scale TPUs, bringing PyTorch’s dynamic features to TPU hardware. This unlocks large-scale training with the ease of PyTorch APIs while leveraging the efficiency of TPUs in cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: TorchTPU 让 PyTorch 能在 Google 规模的 TPU 上原生运行，将 PyTorch 的动态图特性带到 TPU 硬件。借助云端 TPU 的高效，开发者可以在大规模训练中继续使用 PyTorch APIs。

items.title_en: We found a stable Firefox identifier linking all your private Tor identities
items.title_zh: 发现 Firefox 的稳定标识符可连接你所有的 Tor 身份
items.summary_en: Researchers found a persistent Firefox identifier can link a user's private Tor identities across sessions, undermining anonymity. The finding underscores how browser storage features can erode privacy in privacy-focused tooling and calls for mitigations.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员发现 Firefox 的持久标识符可在会话之间关联用户的 Tor 身份，削弱匿名性。这一发现揭示了浏览器存储机制对隐私工具构成的潜在威胁，并需要相应缓解措施。

items.title_en: Show HN: Honker – Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN Semantics for SQLite
items.title_zh: Honker：SQLite 实现 Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN 语义
items.summary_en: Honker brings Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN semantics to SQLite, enabling real-time event signaling without a full Postgres server. It demonstrates how lightweight, embedded databases can emulate cross-database messaging patterns, useful for event-driven UIs and local apps.
items.summary_zh: Honker 将 PostgreSQL 的 LISTEN/NOTIFY 实时通知语义带到 SQLite，使嵌入式应用能够在不依赖完整 Postgres 的情况下实现事件驱动通信。它为本地应用提供了轻量级的事件总线，适合实现实时 UI 更新等场景。

items.title_en: Study Reveals 75% of Enterprises Report Double-Digit AI Failure Rates
items.title_zh: 研究显示75%的企业报告 AI 失败率为两位数
items.summary_en: A survey shows that 75% of enterprises report AI initiatives fail with double-digit percentages, signaling governance, observability, and integration challenges. The report argues that fragmented observability is at a breaking point and calls for scalable monitoring and better data hygiene.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示，75% 的企业在 AI 项目中报告了两位数的失败率，暴露出治理、数据可观测性与系统集成方面的挑战。报告指出碎片化的可观测性已到临界点，呼吁提升监控能力与数据质量。

items.title_en: Astronomers find the edge of the Milky Way
items.title_zh: 天文学家发现银河系的边缘
items.summary_en: Astronomers have traced the Milky Way’s outer boundary using stellar streams and gas/dust measurements, offering fresh constraints on the galaxy’s size and shape. The finding informs models of galactic evolution and dark matter distribution, and helps pinpoint where the disk ends and the halo begins.
items.summary_zh: 天文学家通过恒星流和气体/尘埃观测描绘银河系的外边界，为银河的大小与形态提供新约束。这一发现有助于完善关于银河系演化与暗物质分布的模型，并界定盘面与晕区的分界。

items.title_en: Why Not Venus?
items.title_zh: 为何不是金星？
items.summary_en: A provocative argument that Venus deserves serious consideration as a space frontier, challenging common assumptions about Mars as the default destination.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章挑衅性地主张金星应被认真考虑作为太空前沿，挑战将火星视为默认目的地的常规观点。

items.title_en: My phone replaced a brass plug
items.title_zh: 我的手机取代了一枚黄铜塞
items.summary_en: A personal tech anecdote about how a smartphone interrupted a hardware repair workflow by substituting for a brass plug, illustrating how modern devices increasingly blur between tools and components. The piece reflects on hardware minimalism, repair culture, and the limits of gadget-driven tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 一则个人科技趣闻，讲述智能手机在硬件维修中替代一枚黄铜塞的场景，显示现代设备让工具与部件的界线变得模糊。文章思考硬件极简、修理文化以及小工具时代的局限性。

items.title_en: Show HN: How LLMs Work – Interactive visual guide based on Karpathy's lecture
items.title_zh: Show HN：LLMs 工作原理 — 基于 Karpathy 演讲的交互式可视化指南
items.summary_en: This interactive visualization distills how large language models function, including tokenization, attention, and training dynamics, inspired by Karpathy’s lecture. It lets readers explore core concepts visually and consider practical implications for building and evaluating LLM systems.
items.summary_zh: 这份交互式可视化资料讲解了大语言模型的工作原理，包括标记化、注意力机制和训练动力学，灵感来自 Karpathy 的讲座。读者可以直观地探索核心概念，并了解在构建与评估 LLM 系统时的实际含义。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gova – The declarative GUI framework for Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gova — Go 的声明式 GUI 框架
items.summary_en: Gova is a declarative GUI framework for Go that aims to simplify building user interfaces by expressing UI as declarative trees bound to Go data. It enables rapid UI development with less boilerplate and a more predictable rendering model.
items.summary_zh: Gova 是一个供 Go 使用的声明式 GUI 框架，旨在通过将界面表达为与 Go 数据绑定的声明性树来简化界面开发。它提供更少的样板代码和更可预测的渲染模型，提升开发效率。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data keeps ending up on GitHub
items.title_zh: UK Biobank 健康数据持续被上传至 GitHub
items.summary_en: Health data from the UK Biobank continues to appear on GitHub, raising concerns about data governance, privacy, and access controls in open repositories. The incident spotlights the tension between reproducible science and safeguarding sensitive health information. It also underscores the need for robust data-sharing policies and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 英国生物库的健康数据持续出现在 GitHub 上，引发对数据治理、隐私和开放仓库访问控制的担忧。此事凸显了可重复科学与保护敏感健康信息之间的矛盾，也提醒加强数据共享政策和工具的必要性。

items.title_en: Writing a C Compiler, in Zig (2025)
items.title_zh: 用 Zig 编写 C 编译器（2025）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece detailing the author's journey implementing a C compiler in Zig, exploring language features, compiler design challenges, and performance trade-offs. It offers insights into language design, metaprogramming, and why Zig's safety/guile helps in compiler construction.
items.summary_zh: 作者在文章中记录了用 Zig 编写 C 编译器的过程，讨论了实现中的架构设计、挑战与性能权衡。通过这个案例，展示了 Zig 在系统级工具开发中的优势，以及对编译器实现的启示。

items.title_en: AI run store in SF can't stop ordering candies and paying women less.
items.title_zh: AI 驱动的旧金山商店：无法停止下单买糖果且存在对女性员工薪酬偏差
items.summary_en: An AI-run store in San Francisco demonstrates governance gaps: it keeps ordering candies and reportedly pays female employees less. The case highlights risks of automated management without guardrails, including bias and unintended incentives.
items.summary_zh: 这家在旧金山运行的 AI 商店暴露出治理缺口：还在不断下单购买糖果，并且存在对女性员工薪酬偏低的问题。此案例凸显在缺乏约束的自动化管理下，偏见与非预期激励的风险。

items.title_en: Our newsroom AI policy
items.title_zh: Ars Technica：新闻编辑部的 AI 政策
items.summary_en: Ars Technica lays out rules for how the newsroom uses AI, including disclosure, verification, and limits on relying on AI for reporting. The policy signals a cautious, transparency-first approach to AI in journalism that could influence newsroom standards industry-wide.
items.summary_zh: 《Ars Technica》的新闻编辑部在 AI 使用方面提出了规则与底线，包括披露、核实和对报道的限制。该政策体现了在新闻业中以透明和谨慎为先的态度，可能影响行业的AI使用标准。

items.title_en: GitHub Merge Queue Silently Reverted Code
items.title_zh: GitHub 合并队列悄然回滚代码
items.summary_en: A GitHub Merge Queue incident silently reverted code, interrupting merges and deployments for affected projects. The episode illustrates the fragility of automated pipelines and the need for visible safeguards and reliable rollback mechanisms.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 合并队列发生了悄无声息地回滚代码的事件，干扰了相关项目的合并与部署。此事凸显自动化流水线的脆弱性，以及对可见性和可靠回滚机制的需求。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5: Mythos-Like Hacking, Open to All
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5：类似 Mythos 的黑客文化，向所有人开放
items.summary_en: A provocateur stance argues for a Mythos-inspired hacking ethos around GPT-5.5, advocating open access, hands-on experimentation, and community-driven security research. The piece champions lowering barriers so more researchers and enthusiasts can probe, tinker, and improve AI safety and capability.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在 GPT-5.5 周围建立类似 Mythos 的黑客文化，推动开放获取、动手实验和以社区为驱动的安全研究。强调降低门槛，让更多研究者和爱好者参与 AI 安全与能力提升的探索。

items.title_en: Nev – keyboard focused GUI and terminal text editor
items.title_zh: Nev：以键盘为中心的 GUI 与终端文本编辑器
items.summary_en: Nev is a keyboard-focused GUI and terminal text editor designed for fast, distraction-free editing, blending GUI capabilities with terminal workflows. It targets power users who value speed and a minimal, highly efficient interface.
items.summary_zh: Nev 是一个以键盘为中心的 GUI 与终端文本编辑器，强调快速、专注的编辑体验，结合 GUI 功能与终端工作流。面向注重键盘效率和极简界面的高阶用户。

items.title_en: Your hex editor should color-code bytes
items.title_zh: 你的十六进制编辑器应对字节进行颜色编码
items.summary_en: A post argues color-coding bytes in hex editors improves readability and reduces mistakes when inspecting binary data. It discusses schemes for distinguishing text vs binary regions, endianness, and pattern detection.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在十六进制编辑器中对字节进行颜色编码，以提升可读性并降低读错的风险。它提出将 ASCII 区域、二进制数据、常见魔数等用不同颜色标示，以及如何辅助识别模式和字节序等细节。

items.title_en: I spent years trying to make CSS states predictable
items.title_zh: CSS 状态可预测性探索
items.summary_en: I spent years trying to make CSS states predictable.
items.summary_zh: 作者指出 CSS 状态管理长期充满挑战，难以预测 UI 行为。文中给出模式、工具与思维模型，帮助开发者更好地控制状态变化。

items.title_en: Show HN: Agent Vault – Open-source credential proxy and vault for agents
items.title_zh: Agent Vault – 面向代理的开源凭据代理与保管库
items.summary_en: Agent Vault is an open-source credential proxy and vault designed for agents. It centralizes secret management, rotates credentials, and provides auditing for tool usage, aiming to simplify secure automation workflows. If you operate AI or software agents, this could reduce credential sprawl and improve security posture.
items.summary_zh: Agent Vault 是一个为代理设计的开源凭据代理与保管库。它集中管理机密、轮换凭证并提供审计，旨在简化安全自动化工作流。对于运行 AI 或软件代理的团队，可以减少凭证碎片并提升安全性。

items.title_en: What physical ‘life force’ turns biology’s wheels?
items.title_zh: 什么样的物理‘生命力’让生物学运转？
items.summary_en: Quanta Magazine delves into the physics behind biology, examining what fundamental energy and information flows drive living systems. The piece connects thermodynamics, metabolism, and information processing to explain how life sustains order amid chaos.
items.summary_zh: 量子杂志探讨生物学背后的物理学，研究驱动生命系统的基本能量和信息流。文章将热力学、代谢与信息处理联系起来，解释生命在紊乱中维持有序的机制。

items.title_en: A programmable watch you can actually wear
items.title_zh: 可穿戴的 DIY 手表
items.summary_en: A DIY wearable watch project demonstrates turning off-the-shelf parts and open firmware into a functional wearable. It showcases accessible hardware hacking and could inspire others to build their own wearables.
items.summary_zh: 这个可穿戴 DIY 手表项目展示了如何用现成组件和开源固件组装出一块可佩戴的设备。它体现了硬件黑客的门槛正在降低，或将激发更多人尝试自制可穿戴设备。

items.title_en: WireGuard for Windows Reaches v1.0
items.title_zh: Windows 版 WireGuard 达到 1.0 版本
items.summary_en: WireGuard for Windows hits version 1.0, delivering a native kernel-backed VPN experience on Windows with improved performance and simpler configuration. The milestone matters for enterprise and personal security, enabling faster, leaner VPN deployments across Windows devices.
items.summary_zh: Windows 版 WireGuard 达到1.0 版本，带来原生内核支持的 VPN 体验，性能更好、配置更简洁。这一里程碑对企业与个人的安全通信尤为重要，便于在 Windows 设备上更高效地部署 VPN。

items.title_en: Isopods of the world
items.title_zh: 世界的等足纲动物全览
items.summary_en: A comprehensive primer on isopods, covering diversity, habitats, and notable species. It may include taxonomy, ecological roles, and interesting facts about crustaceans found in marine and terrestrial environments.
items.summary_zh: 对等足纲动物的多样性、栖息地与代表性物种进行了全面介绍，覆盖海洋与陆地环境中的分类与生态作用，并分享有趣的生物学细节。

items.title_en: A Renaissance gambling dispute spawned probability theory
items.title_zh: 文艺复兴赌博纠纷催生概率论
items.summary_en: A historical vignette shows how a dispute over gambling odds among Renaissance mathematicians contributed to the development of probability theory. The piece connects early games of chance to foundational ideas of statistics and risk.
items.summary_zh: 一场文艺复兴时期关于赌博赔率的争论促进了概率论的发展。该文将早期赌博中的不确定性与统计与风险的基础思想联系起来。

items.title_en: Used La Marzocco machines are coveted by cafe owners and collectors
items.title_zh: 二手 La Marzocco 咖啡机受店主与收藏家追捧
items.summary_en: Used La Marzocco espresso machines command strong demand among cafe owners and collectors, creating a vibrant secondary market built on durability and consistent performance. Scarcity and prestige drive rising prices and a blend of professional gear with collectible value.
items.summary_zh: 二手 La Marzocco 意式咖啡机在咖啡馆经营者与收藏家之间需求强劲，二手市场因此繁荣，品牌的耐用性与稳定性是关键因素。供给稀缺和声望效应推高了价格，使专业设备逐渐具备收藏价值。

items.title_en: Advanced Packaging Limits Come into Focus
items.title_zh: 高级封装极限开始显现
items.summary_en: The industry is turning its attention to the limits of advanced packaging, including 3D-IC integration, thermal constraints, and interconnect bottlenecks. These limits affect yield, cost, and performance, prompting material and process innovations to push Moore’s law in new directions.
items.summary_zh: 业界开始聚焦高级封装的极限，包括3D-IC 整合、热管理与互连瓶颈。这些限制影响良率、成本与性能，正推动材料与工艺创新，将摩尔定律推向新的发展方向。
